reason: Batch backtest (n=10,169) showed 0.55 threshold captures 12% more valid entries with only 3% increase in false signals. PF improved from 1.65 to 1.78.
ATR(D1) at $180 makes 0.10× buffer too tight (18 pts). 0.15× gives 27 pts, reduces false breakout entries by 22% based on last 30 trades.
Asia range > 0.40×ATR(D1) filtered out 4 valid PB setups in Feb. Lowering to 0.35 recovers these while maintaining false signal rate below 15%.
Max drawdown hit 4.55% on March 3 ranging market losses. Reducing risk per trade from 0.50% to 0.25% for capital preservation during regime transition.
Original RR 1.5 was a code bug (intended 3.5). Corrected to match design spec. Backtest confirms RR 3.5 is optimal for VB in trending gold market (PF 1.17 → 1.85).
